headline: Meta Stock Turns $1,000 Into $5,300 in 10 Years But Did It Beat The S&P 500?
summary: Ten years ago, Facebook was still Facebook. The company hadn’t yet bought into the metaverse, the Cambridge Analytica scandal hadn’t hit, and Mark Zuckerberg wasn’t talking about superintelligence. Since then, Meta (NASDAQ:META) has rebranded, weathered a near-death stock collapse, and pivoted into one of the biggest AI infrastructure bets in corporate history. The 2021 rename ... headline: Meta AI Delays Test Investor Confidence In New Business Revenue Streams
summary: Meta Platforms delayed the release of its new Spark AI model after earlier timing issues with Llama 4. The company introduced Meta Business Agent, a paid AI tool for businesses that generates direct revenue rather than relying only on advertising. These moves come as regulators and employees increase scrutiny of Meta's AI and data privacy practices. Meta Platforms (NasdaqGS:META) is taking these AI steps with its stock at $627.57 and a value score of 4. The share price is down 3.5% year to...

headline: The Chip ETF That Turned a $10k Bet Into Nearly $20k This Year
summary: If you put $10,000 into Invesco PHLX Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ:SOXQ) on the last trading day of 2025, you are sitting on about $19,400 this morning. The same $10,000 in the S&P 500 (via SPY) is worth roughly $11,140. SOXQ is up 94% year to date through June 2, 2026, against 11% for SPY. The headline ...
